title: THE PULSE BELOW
artPrompt: Story title splash energy WITHOUT painted lettering. Mira at present Rift fringe dissolving into Elara-with-egg vision. Leave clear upper third for title lettering pass. Original Riftwilds IP only. NO dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, or UI in the image.

lines.text: A present-day Keeper touches an ancient tear — and the First Rift answers.
